metadata.title: Wazir-e-Azam Apna Ghar Program – Ghar Ho Tu Apna | Meezan Bank
metadata.description: Meezan Bank offers this facility under its flagship Islamic home financing product, Easy Home – Mera Ghar Mera Ashiana, which provides convenient and affordable housing finance solutions for the construction or purchase of completed housing units in a fully Shariah-compliant manner through the Diminishing Musharakah mode of financing.

content: Meezan EBiz+ LITE Login Meezan EBiz+ Login EBiz+ LITE Login EBiz+ Login Easy Home Apna Ghar Program If you found this page informative, share it now! Facebook LinkedIn X WhatsApp Email Print Ho Tu Apna Subsidized Islamic Housing Finance Scheme With a view to promoting affordable housing finance, the Government of Pakistan has introduced a profit subsidy and risk-sharing scheme titled “Wazir-e-Azam Ghar Ho Tu Apna”. Meezan Bank offers this facility under its flagship Islamic home financing product, Ghar Ho Tu Apna, which provides convenient and affordable housing finance solutions for the construction or purchase of completed housing units in a fully Shariah-compliant manner through the Diminishing Musharakah mode of financing. Product Features & Benefits Maximum Financing Up to PKR 10 million Minimum Contribution from customer 10% of property value Rental Rate 5% for first 10 years and variable at Kibor+3% for subsequent years Financing Tenure Maximum 20-year financing tenure. Size of Housing Unit a) House of up to 10 Marla / 2270 sq ft. b) Flat/apartment of up to 1500 sq ft. Maximum Price of Housing Unit No capping. Basic Eligibility Criteria Citizenship All Resident Pakistani Nationals holding CNIC Property Ownership Requirement First time home owner Collateral Security Requirement As per Bank’s credit policy and prudential regulations for housing finance, the financed housing unit will be mortgaged in favor of the Bank. Note: In line with State Bank of Pakistan's regulatory requirement, negative history (i.e., overdue/ late payment/ write-off/ waiver) of consumer/individual customers will be reflected in e-CIB reports for two years after settlement. Application Form Ho Tu Apna Application Forms Formal Salaried Applicants (Green Form) - Click Here Informal Income Applicants (Pink - Click Here Formal Business Applicants (Blue - Click Here Required Documents FAQs Underlying Shariah Mode The product is based on the concept of Diminishing Musharakah. Under this mode, Bank and Customer become joint owners in a property. The Bank leases its proportionate share of property to customer against periodic rentals. Customer also simultaneously purchases Bank's share of share of property over the financing period to eventually become complete owner of the asset. Easy Buyer Purchase of a constructed residential property (Apartment/Flat/House) Easy Builder Type 1(A) - Residential construction on applicant’s owned land Type 1(B) - Purchase of land & residential construction Processing Charges Type of Charges Salaried Businessmen Processing Charges NIL Legal Report Charges At Actual At Actual Property Valuation Actual At Actual Income Estimation Charges N/A At Actual Documentation charges are exclusive of above-mentioned charges and will be obtained at the time of signing of Musharakah Agreement according to the limits of financing. Key Qualification Criteria Parameters Details Allowable Financing Cities All cities of Pakistan where Meezan Bank has its branch network Age of Applicant / Co-applicant In case of applicant & co-applicant (with income clubbing): Minimum 20 years and maximum 65 years* the time of financing maturity. In case of co-applicant (without years and maximum 70 years of financing maturity. *For salaried person, the age of applicant must not exceed 65 years OR retirement age, whichever is earlier. (Normal retirement age will be considered as 60 years if not mentioned otherwise). Monthly Income Minimum Gross Income PKR 40,000 per month for all individuals Employment / Business Tenor Salaried Individuals Permanent employment with a minimum 6 months of continuous work history in the same industry / field. For contractual employment, a minimum of 1 year same industry / field along with having a total experience of 02 years. Self-Employed / Business Person Minimum 2 years in current business / industry. Co-applicant Income Clubbing 100% income clubbing allowed (up to four co-applicants). Co-applicant must be immediate family member, i.e., spouse, parents, adult children, brothers or sisters only. View the list of designated Meezan Bank branches for the Ho Tu Apna scheme. Contact our Dedicated Representatives Mr. Osama Ashraf (Relationship Manager) Cell No: 0307-5073709 Consumer Center North (Rawalpindi / Islamabad) Address: 2nd Floor, Meezan Tower , New Blue Area, Islamabad. Mr. Khizer Abbas Manager) Cell No: 0307-5074490 / Islamabad) Address: 1st Area, Islamabad. Mr. Bilal Shaukat Manager) Cell No: 0304-1927512 Area, Islamabad. Mr. Muhammad Asif (Area Sales Manager) Cell No: 0304-0920526 Islamabad. Mr. Muhammad Ayaz Khan (Relationship Manager – House Finance -Peshawar) Cell No: 0335-2526404 Consumer Center North (Peshawar) Address: 1st Floor, Khattak Plaza, University Road Branch, Peshawar Mr. Muhammad Aslam (Area Sales Manager - Multan) Cell No: 0300-6380586 & 0304-1927526 E-mail: m.aslam@meezanbank.com Meezan Bank Limited Address: Nawan Shahar LMQ Road, Multan. Dir. No: 061-4781554 Mr. Syed Adash Qamar (Relationship Manager -Bahawalpur) Cell No: 0333-3111333 E-mail: Adash.Qamar@meezanbank.com Bank Limited Address: Dubai Chowk Branch, Bahawalpur. Dir. No: 062-2889418 Mr. Faiz ul Hassan Manager) Cell No: 0309-7772523 Saleemi Chowk Address: P-907-B, Saleemi Chowk Peoples Colony # 01, Faisalabad Mr. Waseem Raja (Relationship Manager Hyderabad) Cell No: 0344-8324209 Address: Regional Office, Property #117, Survey # 41, Saddar Cantt, Hyderabad Mr. Sharafat Hussain Manager) Cell No: 0301-1128462 Address: 3rd Floor, Plot No 42 C, 22nd East Street, Phase 1, D.H.A, Karachi. Mr. Mirza Fahad Baig Manager) Cell No: 0300-2502109 D.H.A, Karachi. Mr. Nazakat Ali Solangi Manager) Cell No: 0301-1133660 D.H.A, Karachi. Mr. Syed Kamran Abidi Manager) Cell No: 0300-8215202 D.H.A, Karachi. Mr. Irfan Najmi Manager) Cell No: 0301-6872884 Gulber Housing Hub (Lahore) Address: 60 - Main Boulevard, Gulberg - II Lahore Mr. Habib Asghar Manager) Cell No: 0301-1189256 II Lahore Mr. Muhammad Arsalan Anwar Manager) Cell No: 0301-7364840 - II Lahore Form submitted successfully Thank you for contacting us! Our representative will call you within 2 working days. Do you have another query?
